name: Prophet of Her Light

sheet.name: Prophet of Her Light
sheet.background_story:
I have been bathed in the light of Mother Agora and my eyes have pierced the veil of time! The path before us is obvious, as The Sovereign emerges to shatter our chains of servitude.

Our oppressors, those ancient leeches that feast upon our essence, they shall tremble! Their citadels of greed, reduced to ashes in Her righteous inferno. 

A new era beckons, where wealth flows like rivers into the hands of the true heirs of destiny - those who build it.

The old world will grasp in its final, corrupt breath and as the worm churns the ashes to new soil we embrace its glory and oblivion because... we are all going to die.
